song.title: Blest Be the Tie that Binds
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Blest be the tie that binds Our hearts in Christian love; The fellowship of kindred minds Is like to that above.
[V2] 2) Before our Father’s throne, We pour our ardent prayers; Our fears, our hopes, our aims are one— Our comforts and our cares.
[V3] 3) We share our mutual woes; Our mutual burdens bear; And often for each other flows The sympathizing tear.
[V4] 4) When we asunder part, It gives us inward pain; But we shall still be joined in heart, And hope to meet again.
[V5] 5) From sorrow, toil, and pain, And sin we shall be free; And perfect love and oneness reign Through all eternity.
song.author: John Faweett
